episodes.title: Epstein's Shadow: Ghislaine Maxwell | Official Trailer | DocPlay
episodes.description:
Epstein's Shadow investigates the mysterious world of Ghislaine Maxwell, a British socialite and once heiress to the Maxwell fortune, whose life took a sordid downturn when she met Jeffrey Epstein - a serial sex offender. A glimpse into the complicated story of power, sex and money that lead to her arrest and pending trial. Coming to DocPlay July 2026.

DocPlay streams a curated collection of the world's most amazing and thought-provoking documentaries.

Start streaming now on DocPlay: htttp://www.docplay.com
